name: Quiche Ole
recipeInstructions:
Quiche: Toss the cheese with flour. Add eggs, milk, and seasonings and mix well. Pour into pastry shell and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until set. Cut into wedges and top with Spanish Sauce.
Sauce: Heat vegetables in catsup until crisp-tender. Makes 1 1/2 cups. Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
